scripts.build:watch: watchexec -w src -w node_modules/wrap-core/src bun run scripts/build.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.optimize: docker build -t wrap-dspy -f eval/dspy/Dockerfile . && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/eval/examples":/app/eval/examples -v "$(pwd)/eval/results":/app/eval/results -v "$(pwd)/eval/dspy":/app/eval/dspy -v "$(pwd)/eval/bridge.ts":/app/eval/bridge.ts -v "$(pwd)/src":/app/src -v dspy-cache:/root/.dspy_cache -v bridge-cache:/tmp/wrap-bridge-cache --env-file eval/dspy/.env wrap-dspy && bunx biome format src/prompt.optimized.json --write
